title: Better Ping
description: Adds new ping display colors to the tab!
body:
![BP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/121c412415a813eacc6296991a2c5b76a4cb0668.png)

Adds new ping display colors to the tab!

Feature:

- Adds a different ping color to the tab

- The color depends on the ping status

- Located in the tab, it is convenient to watch

- Works when playing on servers

- Works in an online game

![NC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b62d648cb3fcd1ac853ac65c46ca2c20835f9d.png)

                                                         Which depend on your ping
![P12345](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eea61d88fd03fd13d961d36bad68c66c6ed89de3.png)

 ――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

  • Sure many people would like to make the ping in the tab more convenient, but the numbers often don't look very nice. However, there is a solution!

  • Resource Pack will add color to your ping, depending on its state!
